## Summary

Describe the user-facing purpose of this change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Installer or tooling
- [ ] Examples or benchmarks
- [ ] Maintenance

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_skills.py`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/generate_inventory.py` if skills changed
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Relevant examples, screenshots, or benchmark notes added when applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] The change has a clear public use case.
- [ ] New or changed skill descriptions have narrow trigger boundaries.
- [ ] Collections are updated when relevant.
- [ ] Generated inventory files are refreshed when relevant.
- [ ] No private paths, credentials, secrets, or personal-only instructions are included.
- [ ] Verification results are reported accurately.
